question.text: Lock-up agreement restrictions for research analysts who were managers of a public offering prohibit publishing research for:

answer.text: 25 days before and 25 days after lock-up expiry
15 days prior to and 15 days after the expiration/waiver/termination of a lock-up agreement
40 days total around the lock-up period
No restriction related to lock-up periods

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 18(3): Cannot publish research 15 days before and 15 days after lock-up expiry/waiver/termination (with compliance approval exception). **The Trap:** Different from the post-offering blackout periods. Lock-up-related restrictions are 15+15 days. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 14 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Lock-up expiry creates selling pressure as insiders can sell. Research around this period could influence the market inappropriately.
